ocr.text: In the evolving landscape of pharmaceuticals and biotechnology, Pfizer's commitment to addressing rare diseases and
enhancing its oncology portfolio remains a focal point of its strategic initiatives. The accompanying data table provides a
comprehensive overview of the financial performance of Pfizer’s rare disease franchise, highlighting key metrics such as Total
Revenue (GBP) and Net Income (GBP) across multiple quarters. As the company navigates regulatory landscapes, the timelines
for New Drug Applications (NDA) and the anticipated approval of VaccineX are pivotal in shaping future revenue streams and
overall profitability.

investment strategies and operational efficiencies.
